name: Beef Stir Fry with Tri-Color Peppers (Rsf
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from beef and cut crosswise into 1/4 inch slices.
2. Heat oil in a large, non-stick skillet over high heat until hot.
3. Add pork to the skillet and stir fry with soy sauce for 3 minutes or until the meat is cooked through.
4. Remove the pork mixture from the skillet and set aside, keeping it warm.
5. Place the skillet back on medium-high heat. Add onion and bell peppers, and stir-fry for 5 minutes.
6. Return the pork mixture to the skillet. Stir in vinegar and cook for an additional minute.
7. Yield: 4 servings. Approximately 166 calories per cup serving.
